title: Fables for the Witching Hour
overview: Late night lab technician Tina warns viewers of five tantalizing tales of terror and cautions them before watching. Little does she know a shadowy menace prowls the dark office halls, closing in on her as the witching hour fast approaches. Will she survive the night?
